name: Oxford Athletics Track (Horspath)
metaTitle: Horspath Athletics Ground Oxford | Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and track information for the Horspath Athletics Ground in Oxford.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: The track is open year-round for pass holders. Check the Oxford City AC calendar for club training times and closures.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Access is managed via a track pass system. You must purchase a daily or annual pass online before arriving at the venue.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: Managed by Oxford City Athletic Club, this facility serves as the primary track and field complex for the Oxford area.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Free on-site parking for up to 200 cars. Alternative parking may be arranged at the adjacent BMW plant for major events.

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Oxford City AC website to purchase track passes and view the live schedule.
